message:
Command `
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== core.v header ==="
head -30 "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/core.v" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v header ==="
head -40 "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== padframe.v header ==="
head -20 "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/padframe.v" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:

echo "=== core.v header ==="

echo ""

head -40 "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== padframe.v header ==="
head -20 "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/padframe.v" 2>/dev/null
", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== core.v header ===
// Auto-generated Sky130 padframe Verilog
// Core module for design: mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu
// Generated by Sky130 Padframe Generator
//
// This is the core wrapper with placeholder for user logic.
// Connect your design logic inside this module.

`default_nettype none

module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper (
    clk_in,
    clk_out,
    clk_oe_n,
    clk_in_h,
    clk_dm_0,
    clk_dm_1,
    clk_dm_2,
    clk_analog_en,
    clk_analog_pol,
    clk_analog_sel,
    clk_enable_h,
    clk_enable_inp_h,
    clk_enable_vdda_h,
    clk_enable_vddio,
    clk_enable_vswitch_h,
    clk_hld_h_n,
    clk_hld_ovr,
    clk_ib_mode_sel,
    clk_inp_dis,
    clk_slow,

=== mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v header ===
// mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu chip top-level
// Connects padframe (IO ring) to core wrapper (compute subsystem)
//
// Hierarchy:
//   mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip
//     +-- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_padframe  (IO pad ring)
//     +-- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper   (core wrapper)
//
// Generated by nc_chipgen

`default_nettype none

module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip (
    inout clk,
    inout reset_n,
    inout pad_gpioa_0,
    inout pad_gpioa_1,
    inout pad_gpioa_2,
    inout pad_gpioa_3,
    inout pad_gpioa_4,
    inout pad_gpioa_5,
    inout pad_gpioa_6,
    inout pad_gpioa_7,
    inout pad_gpioa_8,
    inout pad_gpioa_9,
    inout pad_gpioa_10,
    inout pad_gpioa_11,
    inout pad_gpioa_12,
    inout pad_gpioa_13,
    inout pad_gpioa_14,
    inout pad_gpioa_15,
    inout pad_gpiob_0,
    inout pad_gpiob_1,
    inout pad_gpiob_2,
    inout pad_gpiob_3,
    inout pad_gpiob_4,
    inout pad_gpiob_5,
    inout pad_gpiob_6,
    inout pad_gpiob_7,
    inout pad_gpiob_8,

=== padframe.v header ===
// Auto-generated Sky130 padframe Verilog
// Padframe module for design: mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu
// Generated by Sky130 Padframe Generator
//
// This module connects external pads to core signals.
// Power rails are inout ports for distribution.

`default_nettype none

module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_padframe (
    clk,
    reset_n,
    pad_gpioa_0,
    pad_gpioa_1,
    pad_gpioa_2,
    pad_gpioa_3,
    pad_gpioa_4,
    pad_gpioa_5,
    pad_gpioa_6,
    pad_gpioa_7,
